description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, depicted with angular and abstracted forms. The figure appears to be composed of sharply faceted surfaces, with a prominent upper section that suggests a head and shoulders, and a broader lower section that could represent the torso and legs. The color palette is dominated by deep reds, browns, and muted grays, giving the figure a stylized, modern appearance. There are no visible facial features or fine anatomical details, and the overall silhouette is blocky and geometric. The object does not display any accessories or carried items, and the posture suggests a neutral, upright stance. The surface finish appears smooth and hard, with some glossy reflections visible on the upper surfaces.
description: A stylized, angular adult pedestrian figure with faceted surfaces and a modern, abstract form. The object features a blocky silhouette in red, brown, and gray tones.
description_view_0: This view shows the lower section of the figure, with brown and black angular surfaces and a hint of the upper body in shadow.
description_view_1: The side of the figure is visible, highlighting the red upper section and a sharp transition to gray and black surfaces below.
description_view_2: The top and upper body are prominent, with red and gray planes intersecting and a clear geometric abstraction of the torso.
description_view_3: This view is mostly in shadow, revealing little detail except for a dark, flat surface.
attribute_clothing_type: abstracted geometric outerwear, possibly a coat or jacket with stylized form
